message:
fix(web,manifest,update): move providers out of Suspense, bump versions, harden gh extension check

- Move QueryProvider/MotionProvider/AnalyticsProvider outside Suspense boundary in layout.tsx to fix hydration issues
- Bump root package version 0.4.0 -> 0.6.0
- Bump @acfs/manifest version 0.3.0 -> 0.6.0 and mark as private
- Filter "no extensions" messages from gh extension list to prevent false-positive upgrade attempts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -92,12 +92,12 @@ export default function RootLayout({
         <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-noise" />
         <Suspense fallback={null}>
           <ThirdPartyScripts />
-          <QueryProvider>
-            <MotionProvider>
-              <AnalyticsProvider>{children}</AnalyticsProvider>
-            </MotionProvider>
-          </QueryProvider>
         </Suspense>
+        <QueryProvider>
+          <MotionProvider>
+            <AnalyticsProvider>{children}</AnalyticsProvider>
+          </MotionProvider>
+        </QueryProvider>
       </body>
     </html>
   );

@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "@acfs/manifest",
-  "version": "0.3.0",
+  "version": "0.6.0",
+  "private": true,
   "description": "Parser and utilities for ACFS manifest files",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "./dist/index.js",

@@ -1759,7 +1759,7 @@ update_cloud() {
         capture_version_before "gh"
         # Update gh extensions if any are installed
         local gh_extensions=0
-        gh_extensions=$(gh extension list 2>/dev/null | wc -l || true)
+        gh_extensions=$(gh extension list 2>/dev/null | grep -v "no installed extensions found" | grep -v "No extensions installed" | wc -l || true)
         gh_extensions=$((gh_extensions + 0))  # Strip whitespace, ensure integer
         if [[ $gh_extensions -gt 0 ]]; then
             run_cmd "GitHub CLI extensions" gh extension upgrade --all
